attributes.action: Bring the magic of the olympics back to the uk. (Host the olympics 2036 or 2040)
attributes.additional_details: Let bring the magic of hosting it back to the uk. It brough neighbours together and supporting team gb at the game and the magic of 2012 olympics and repeat it.
attributes.background: Lets make a proposal bid for the olympics either for the 2036 olympics or 2040.

rejection.details:
We can't accept your petition because the UK Government and Parliament aren't responsible for the issue you raise.

This is a matter for the British Olympic Association, not the Government or House of Commons.
